testcase.name: test_critique_loop_runs_with_glossary_terms

failure.message: TypeError: Term.__init__() missing 3 required positional arguments: 'source_lang', 'target_lang', and 'domain'

testcase.failure: tests/test_glossary_enforcement.py:53: in test_critique_loop_runs_with_glossary_terms terms = [_make_term("source_word", "target_word")] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/test_glossary_enforcement.py:27: in _make_term return Term(source_text=source, target_text=target, confidence=confidence) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: Term.__init__() missing 3 required positional arguments: 'source_lang', 'target_lang', and 'domain'
